text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Great victory! I've shown
everyone the power of feng shui once again!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy to see the visitors getting excited
too! ♪
choice_data_list: I'd expect no less of you, Rickey!
I know you've still got more in you!
I know you've still got more in you!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy to see the visitors getting excited
too! ♪
choice_data_list: I'd expect no less of you, Rickey!
I know you've still got more in you!
I know you've still got more in you!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if everyone understands just how
incredible feng shui is now?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to go and get a feel for the visitors'
reactions! I want to find out if I've piqued their
interest!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If any of them look interested, maybe I can ask
them directly. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, of course! I need to keep racking up
victories and show everyone just how incredible
feng shui is!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you have a little time after this? I
want to get training while my qi is in alignment!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! I have to do my best in the next race
and put a smile on everyone's faces!
